releases.summary: This release expands self-service analytics across Access Analytics and Patient Watchtower, accelerates data availability, and introduces new consent-handling controls in the Patient Services CRM.

updates.title: Saved Views
updates.body: Save any filtered dashboard configuration and share it with your team, so recurring analyses are one click away.

updates.title: Faster Global Search
updates.body: Cross-platform search now returns results up to 3x faster and includes patient program and payer name matches.

updates.title: Large Export Reliability
updates.body: Resolved an issue where exports spanning very wide date ranges could occasionally time out.

updates.title: Consent & Compliance Hub (CCH)
updates.body: Full consent management is now live — view consent health at a glance, drill into patient-level consent details, access evidence documents, and run the Alignment Report to identify misalignment across your book of business. Navigation access is entitlement-controlled per role.

updates.title: Save Views — Platform-wide
updates.body: Save and reload your filtered list views across Patient Tracking, Journey Board, Tasks, Inquiries, Interactions, User Management, HCP, HCO, Contacts, and Infusion Sites.

updates.title: Patient Profile — HCO Contacts
updates.body: Relevant HCO contacts are now surfaced directly on the patient profile for faster outreach.

updates.title: Contacts Listing — Fax Number
updates.body: Fax numbers are now visible in the Contacts listing view.

updates.title: Navigation Updates
updates.body: Product navigation has been restructured to align with the ClaritasRx product offering model.

updates.title: Data Hub (SuperAdmin)
updates.body: A dedicated Data Hub view is now available for Management App and SuperAdmin users.

updates.title: Enrollment
updates.body: Editing an enrollment now correctly updates the enrollment-created prescription, not SP-ingested ones. Also fixed a separate issue where editing primary insurance created duplicate primary insurance records.

updates.title: Historical Patient Write-backs
updates.body: Editing a historical patient profile now updates the existing patient in Ascend rather than creating a new record.

updates.title: Consent Status
updates.body: Fixed a bug where a patient's consent status incorrectly reverted to "non-consented" after a valid enrollment.

updates.title: Patient Phone Numbers
updates.body: Primary contact phone numbers now display correctly; some patients were showing alternate or caregiver numbers in the primary contact field.

updates.title: Tasks — Assignee Dropdown
updates.body: The Assignee dropdown now correctly shows team members when creating a task (previously showed empty for some teams).

updates.title: Tasks — Role Permissions
updates.body: Fixed 403/500 errors when creating tasks as FRM and certain SP-role users.

updates.title: Inquiries — Document Upload
updates.body: SP users can now upload documents in Inquiries without hitting a 403 error.

updates.title: External Communication
updates.body: Fixed the "To" dropdown in new SMS conversations — options now populate on click without requiring the user to type first. Also resolved null display names and missing contact state in the chat window.

updates.title: Patient Tracking — Days Pending Filter
updates.body: Fixed a server error when applying the "Days Pending in Bucket" filter on Patient Tracking.

updates.title: Patient Status — Role Visibility
updates.body: Patient status column now renders correctly for PAL role users.

updates.title: HCP — File Export
updates.body: Downloading patient data from the HCP Patients tab now works correctly for both XLS and CSV formats.

updates.title: Notifications
updates.body: Fixed incorrect routing of inquiry notifications that were being mapped under Patient Watchtower.
